violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the vent (behind ice machine) has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
The floors in the basement area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
Pasta was observed held past 7 days. Pasta was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (fish) was observed thawed with the package intact. ROP seafood must be completely removed from the package when thawing. Fish was observed held at 38 degrees Fahrenheit and removed from the package during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The ice machine and prep sink are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
